email_subject: Application for International Inside Sales - Industry - Wallonia
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the International Inside Sales position at Michael Page International (Belgium). With a strong background in customer-facing roles, complex coordination, and technical communication, I am confident I can contribute to your client's European sales team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client relationships, coordinate with internal teams, and ensure accurate communication of requirements—skills directly transferable to inside sales. My experience in logistics at Katoen Natie has honed my ability to prioritize in fast-paced environments. I am fluent in English (C-level) and Turkish (native), meeting the language requirements.

I am intellectually agile, highly organized, and eager to take ownership. I thrive on learning technical information and am comfortable on the phone, proactively solving issues. I am excited about the opportunity to grow within a global leader in advanced alloys.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how I can add value to your team.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the International Inside Sales - Industry - Wallonia position at Michael Page International (Belgium). Your client's role as a global leader in advanced alloys for aerospace, medical, and energy sectors aligns perfectly with my background in technical communication, customer coordination, and fast-paced problem-solving.

While my career has been in digital marketing and logistics, I bring the core competencies you seek: high customer interaction, complex coordination, and strong communication. At Episto, I manage multiple client websites, handling inquiries, coordinating with teams, and ensuring timely delivery—skills directly applicable to managing orders and shipments. My logistics experience at Katoen Natie taught me to maintain accuracy under pressure, a must for navigating strict quality and export compliance.

I am fluent in English (C-level) and Turkish (native), meeting your language requirements. I am intellectually curious and quick to absorb technical information, as demonstrated by my self-taught expertise in SEO and GEO. I am exceptionally organized, assertive on the phone, and solution-oriented—I anticipate issues and always have a Plan B. I thrive in multicultural environments and am eager to take on responsibility and grow within your organization.

Your offer of full training, a stable yet fast-growing environment, and real career progression is exactly what I am looking for. I am confident I can contribute to your client's ambitious growth plans and provide excellent commercial experience to European customers.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills and attitude can benefit your team.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Fluent in English (C-level) and Turkish (native) – meets mandatory language requirements
Proven customer-facing experience managing inquiries, orders, and coordination across teams
Strong organizational skills and ability to prioritize in fast-paced, high-pressure environments
Intellectually agile with a technical foundation and quick absorption of complex information
Assertive and proactive communicator, comfortable on the phone and solving issues independently
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I manage client relationships, coordinate with internal teams, and ensure accurate communication of requirements—skills directly transferable to inside sales. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer coordination & communication: managing inquiries, orders, and cross-team coordination; proactive phone communication; solution-oriented problem-solving
- Languages: English (professional, C-level), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
